name: ai-project-acceleration-package-full-model-management
purpose: Universal AI work package for existing codebases, with a frontier burst layer to extract and freeze maximum value from a powerful model that may be available only briefly.
core_rule: No task is done without proof.
new_in_v3: Regeneration loop: an empty corrective backlog reopens feature discovery (similar projects research, completeness matrix, opportunity list, feature generation) instead of stopping. The loop ends only when a full regeneration pass yields no new safe provable work.
L0 now truly removes human in the loop: risky or irreversible items are deferred to TODO_BLOCKED.md and the run continues, instead of stopping to ask. Only capability failures end a run.
standing approval now implies L0 fully autonomous (removes the L1 phase-boundary pause that stopped runs after planning)
Phase 5 implementation made mandatory in AUTORUN_MAX; analysis/plan files alone never count as done
30_OVERSIGHT_AND_JOURNALING.md (initial one-time setup: human-in-the-loop level, info type and verbosity, full journaling; safe defaults if unanswered)
universal exploration across all spheres plus an error and failure recovery loop in 29
29_EXPLORATION_AND_SPIKES.md (explore real forks on parallel branches with commits and PRs, evaluate, converge, keep every path recoverable and revisitable)
28_PREFLIGHT_AUTOCONFIG.md (auto-detects environment, stack, git host, permissions, web, data sensitivity; safe defaults; no setup questions)
26_GIT_GITHUB_WORKFLOW.md (Git/GitHub best practices: branches, conventional commits, PRs, review, CI, protected main, semver)
27_ROLE_ORCHESTRATION.md (coordinated engineering org: role chain, gates, parallelization)
git/ helpers: branching strategy, commit convention, PR template, code review checklist, example CI
AUTORUN_MAX.md (self-driving maximization: discover all tasks, audit, research similar projects online, plan, implement in a proven loop)
location-independent check scripts (no hardcoded ai-work/ prefix)
frontier tier in model-registry and routing-policy
